languages.text: "Похвальное стремление, и вдвойне любопытно, что я слышу о нем именно здесь и сейчас". {n}Наследница смотрит на вас с живым интересом.{/n} "Нам стоит обсудить все детали".

traits.locale_text: "Похвальное стремление, и вдвойне любопытно, что я слышу о нем именно здесь и сейчас". {n}Наследница смотрит на вас с живым интересом.{/n} "Нам стоит обсудить все детали".
traits.speaker: JuvennaVonValancius

languages.text: "A laudable aspiration. It is especially curious that I am learning of it here and now." {n}The von Valancius heir looks at you with keen interest.{/n} "We should discuss the details."
languages.original_text: "Похвальное стремление, и вдвойне любопытно, что я слышу о нем именно здесь и сейчас". {n}Наследница смотрит на вас с живым интересом.{/n} "Нам стоит обсудить все детали".

traits.locale_text: "A laudable aspiration. It is especially curious that I am learning of it here and now." {n}The von Valancius heir looks at you with keen interest.{/n} "We should discuss the details."

"A laudable aspiration. It is especially curious that I am learning of it here and now." {n}The von Valancius heir looks at you with keen interest.{/n} "We should discuss the details."

languages.text: «Una aspiración loable. Es particularmente peculiar que la descubra aquí y ahora». {n}La heredera von Valancius te mira con un interés astuto.{/n} «Deberíamos discutir los detalles».
languages.original_text: "A laudable aspiration. It is especially curious that I am learning of it here and now." {n}The von Valancius heir looks at you with keen interest.{/n} "We should discuss the details."

traits.locale_text: «Una aspiración loable. Es particularmente peculiar que la descubra aquí y ahora». {n}La heredera von Valancius te mira con un interés astuto.{/n} «Deberíamos discutir los detalles».

languages.text: “真是令人钦佩的抱负。最为有趣的是，我竟是在此时此地才得知。”{n}这位冯·瓦兰修斯的继承人饶有兴致地看着你。{/n}“我们该谈谈细节。”
languages.original_text: "A laudable aspiration. It is especially curious that I am learning of it here and now." {n}The von Valancius heir looks at you with keen interest.{/n} "We should discuss the details."

traits.locale_text: “真是令人钦佩的抱负。最为有趣的是，我竟是在此时此地才得知。”{n}这位冯·瓦兰修斯的继承人饶有兴致地看着你。{/n}“我们该谈谈细节。”

languages.text: « Une démarche des plus louables. Il est d'autant plus curieux que je l'apprenne ici et maintenant. » {n}L'héritière des von Valancius vous regarde avec un intérêt redoublé.{/n} « Nous devrions en discuter plus avant. »
languages.original_text: "A laudable aspiration. It is especially curious that I am learning of it here and now." {n}The von Valancius heir looks at you with keen interest.{/n} "We should discuss the details."

traits.locale_text: « Une démarche des plus louables. Il est d'autant plus curieux que je l'apprenne ici et maintenant. » {n}L'héritière des von Valancius vous regarde avec un intérêt redoublé.{/n} « Nous devrions en discuter plus avant. »

languages.text: "Övgüye değer bir istek. Bunu burada ve şimdi öğreniyor olmam özellikle ilginç." {n}Von Valancius vârisi sana büyük bir ilgiyle bakıyor.{/n} "Ayrıntıları konuşmalıyız."
languages.original_text: "A laudable aspiration. It is especially curious that I am learning of it here and now." {n}The von Valancius heir looks at you with keen interest.{/n} "We should discuss the details."

traits.locale_text: "Övgüye değer bir istek. Bunu burada ve şimdi öğreniyor olmam özellikle ilginç." {n}Von Valancius vârisi sana büyük bir ilgiyle bakıyor.{/n} "Ayrıntıları konuşmalıyız."

languages.text: "Ein lobenswertes Ziel. Wirklich erstaunlich, dass ich hier und jetzt davon erfahre." {n}Die Erbin derer von Valancius sieht dich mit ehrlichem Interesse an.{/n} "Wir sollten die Details besprechen."
languages.original_text: "A laudable aspiration. It is especially curious that I am learning of it here and now." {n}The von Valancius heir looks at you with keen interest.{/n} "We should discuss the details."

traits.locale_text: "Ein lobenswertes Ziel. Wirklich erstaunlich, dass ich hier und jetzt davon erfahre." {n}Die Erbin derer von Valancius sieht dich mit ehrlichem Interesse an.{/n} "Wir sollten die Details besprechen."

languages.text: 「立派な志ですね。ここにいて今、それを知ることに、特に興味があります。」{n}フォン・ヴァランキウス家の相続人は、あなたを鋭い興味で見ている。{/n}「詳細について話し合いたいと思います。」
languages.original_text: "A laudable aspiration. It is especially curious that I am learning of it here and now." {n}The von Valancius heir looks at you with keen interest.{/n} "We should discuss the details."

traits.locale_text: 「立派な志ですね。ここにいて今、それを知ることに、特に興味があります。」{n}フォン・ヴァランキウス家の相続人は、あなたを鋭い興味で見ている。{/n}「詳細について話し合いたいと思います。」
